premarket_brief:
# PRE-MARKET GAME PLAN | 2026-06-02

**Market Tone:** Flat open with VIX at 20—neutral volatility. Bull regime intact but 50% breadth signals caution; expect range-bound consolidation rather than directional conviction.

**Positions to Watch:** MSFT +0.9% showing strength; monitor for reversal if tech sector fades. Hold MU/crypto positions unchanged unless gap down >1.5%.

**Top Entry:** UBER/DASH—wait for high-volume breakout above recent resistance with confirmed sector momentum in fintech/delivery. Enter only on directional conviction, not chop.

**Risk Note:** 50% breadth +
